lastUpdatedNote: PR #143 (docs/process) — lesson→guard coverage audit + CLAUDE.md Step 11 guard-first flip. Classified all 20 LESSONS.md entries: 6 GUARDED / 6 MECHANIZABLE-UNGUARDED / 5 INHERENTLY-PROCESS (of 17 defect-bearing) → recommended flipping the reflect default so shipped-defect lessons ship a mechanical guard (prose demoted to the guard's comment), proven in-repo by PR #140's tools.test.js. Meta-finding: NO CI workflow runs npm test/lint — guards exist but aren't enforced. #143 review folded: aligned a doc line-number (124→128), logged a latent v-html stored-XSS surface (RossHomeDesktop.vue:203) to the triage queue, and added a contingent guard-backfill backlog item (3c). ——— PR #140 — askRoss tool-schema dialect fix (LAUNCH-CRITICAL). Ask Ross 400d on every turn ("Ross hit a problem mid-answer"): toAnthropicTools emitted the OpenAPI-3.0/draft-4 dialect (boolean exclusiveMinimum from z.number().positive() on getRunHistory.limit + snoozeCard.hours) but the Anthropic Messages API requires JSON Schema draft 2020-12 (numeric exclusiveMinimum), so it rejected the tools array before any answer. Found via prod rossChat logs while smoke-testing the #139 preview — all 139 server tests mocked the LLM client, so the dialect was never validated against the real API. Fix: drop {target:openApi3} -> default jsonSchema7 (the jsonSchema2020-12 target is itself buggy and re-emits the boolean form). +2 regression guards; 175/175 functions green; rossChat redeployed (rosschat-00004-qun); verified live (clean turn, 1c debit). ——— PR #139 — Phase 7 ② askRoss slice 5 Ask Ross ⌘K client (PR open). Replaces the scripted askRoss() stub with a live ⌘K command-palette modal that streams a multi-turn Ross conversation from the rossChat SSE Cloud Function, renders inline confirm-cards (Approve→resume / Cancel→decline) for confirm-tier actions, live tool-action lines, and friendly terminal/error banners. Three pure/thin modules — ross-agent-sse.js (stateful SSE frame parser), ross-agent-conversation.js (immutable event→state reducer, reuses threadId across turns), ross-agent-client.js (fetch()+ReadableStream transport: native EventSource is GET-only and cannot send an Authorization header; sends a FLAT body since rossChat reads req.body directly, NOT req.body.data like sibling services; all failures surface as synthetic {type:error} events) — plus 3 components (RossAskModal + RossAskMessage + RossAskConfirmCard, all server text via Vue {{ }} auto-escaping, never v-html). Opens from ⌘K / rail panel / header button / card #ask=<seed> deep-link. 20 new unit tests on the risky pure logic; build + 173/173 functions tests green (no regression). Subagent-driven 8-task build with per-task spec+quality review + a final cross-cutting review; 2 findings folded (fresh bubble on resume, finalize turn on terminal/error), 1 correctly declined. Desktop only — mobile pill wiring + fetch-cancellation + ⌘K-cold-start + hash-clear backlogged (item 3a). ——— PR #138 — slice 7 ross/agent* RTDB rules + rossAgentPrune scheduled CF (daily 03:30; prunes expired agentPending + stale debitGuard); the launch-blocker before the client slice. PR #136 — Phase 7 ② askRoss slice 4 confirm-flow MERGED. The agent now authors the playbook with the owner in the loop: a confirm-tier tool PAUSES → persists ross/agentPending/{uid}/{turnId} (10-min expiry, uid-scoped) + debits Request A + emits a confirm card → the owner's resume re-runs the gates (kill-switch holds), fail-closed expiry, atomic one-time-consume, executes (audited confirmed:<uid>) or declines, continues (Request B). The 4 confirm tools (activate/create/edit/pause workflow) promoted to READY via owner-callable cores in ross.js shared with the live CFs (byte-for-byte parity; those 3 handlers had zero prior tests → ross-workflow-ops.test.js is the net). 8 commits / 7 TDD phases; two review rounds (security + automated), all folded (H-1 gate-on-resume, M-1 fail-closed expiry + pending-flag symmetry, M-2 payload guard + email-in-audit, M-3 summary fallbacks). 166/166 tests + build green. ⚠ rossChat is LIVE — redeploy needed. NEXT = slice 7 ross/agent* RTDB rules + prune (launch-blocker before slice 5). ——— PR #134 — Phase 7 ② askRoss slice 3 rossChat reactive SSE Cloud Function MERGED (the project's first AI-inference CF). functions/agent/rossChat.js: 4 pre-flight gates (kill switch → per-owner enable → features.rossAgent → ledger balance; super-admins skip entitlement+balance, NOT the kill switch) → cached two-breakpoint prompt + bounded history → runAgentLoop (streams text; auto tools via executeTool; non-auto refused server-side — confirm-flow is slice 4) → single idempotent recordUsageAndDebit(toLedgerUnits(usage), requestId) → persist turn + SSE. New verifyRossAgentAccess (recognises rossAgent; verifyUserOrAdmin untouched) + a ross.js test seam. Built in 6 TDD phases; two review rounds (local security+code, then automated — NO blocking findings), all folded: server-generated requestId (closed a free-turn vector), threadId/clientToday validation, best-effort loop that still debits partial spend on an LLM error, structured SSE events, warm-client reuse. 139/139 functions tests + build green; catalog updated (both copies). ⚠ deploy SECRET-FIRST (functions:secrets:set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — unprovisioned defineSecret blocks ALL deploys); server-only, no client yet. Remaining: slice 4 confirm-flow, 5 Ask Ross client, 6 evals, 7 ross/agent* RTDB rules (before slice 5). T-2 (billing/debitGuard unbounded growth from the per-request UUID) → bug queue. ——— PR #132 — Phase 7 ② askRoss Agent slice 1 (llm-client.js) MERGED. The swappable wrapper over the raw Anthropic Messages API for the v1 reactive engine: streamTurn (pipes text deltas to onText + returns {content,usage,stopReason}), createTurn (non-streaming eval judge), toLedgerUnits (snake→camel mapper closing the #129 §2.1 zero-charge trap), MODELS (AGENT claude-sonnet-4-6 / JUDGE claude-haiku-4-5-20251001), lazy/injectable client seam. 9 tests; API surface verified vs the live SDK docs (context7); deliberately NOT using beta.toolRunner (reactive v1 owns its loop). Adds @anthropic-ai/sdk. Review 1 🔴 folded (Haiku model ID needed the date suffix — would 404 at runtime) + 2 (?? not ||, maxTokens 4096). 48 agent tests + build green. Slices 1+2 done; NEXT = slice 3 rossChat SSE CF (pre-flight gates → agent loop wiring streamTurn+executeTool → recordUsageAndDebit(toLedgerUnits(usage)) → SSE + defineSecret + CORS + rossAgent-aware auth). ——— PR #130 — Phase 7 ② askRoss Agent BUILD STARTED: the engine-agnostic core (slice 2) is merged. functions/agent/ — constants/policy/prompt/tools/execute, ZERO hard dependency on either engine ('one core, two engines': v1 reactive on the raw Anthropic Messages API, v2 proactive on the Claude Agent SDK). ONE Zod tool registry → toAnthropicTools (JSON schema) + toSdkMcpServer (lazy/seamed) projections; effectivePolicy (owner may tighten only) + autoAllowlist (proactive static allowlist); two-breakpoint cached system prompt (mode-aware); executeTool audit-wraps every run + captures no-undo prev value; isAgentSubmittable (§3.1 measurement gate — never fabricate a compliance record). 4 ready adapters (getWorkflowDigest/getStaff/getRunHistory/snoozeCard) + 12 pending (catalog-complete, run throws AdapterPendingError). 39 agent + 87 functions tests green; build green. Review 0 must-fix; 5 findings folded — incl. catching that a reviewer-suggested agentConfig client-write rule CONTRADICTED spec §9 (server-only writes, CF-mediated reads) and was deliberately NOT adopted. Deferred follow-ups: 3 ross.js extraction refactors (getWorkflows/getReports/createWorkflow), 3 reader CFs (food-cost/guests/sales — no CF/schema yet), advanceDueDate recurrence (overlaps the recurrence-engine bug), slice-7 RTDB rules timing. ——— PR #129 — askRoss agent SPEC REVISED before the build, after a design session on the Claude Agent SDK vs the raw Messages API: §1.1 'engine-agnostic core' (own the loop reactive / rent the loop proactive) + §2.1 per-engine billing. Ground-truth check of functions/billing/ledger.js confirmed it ALREADY prices 4 cache-token classes (no ledger change) but caught a snake_case API usage → camelCase ledger units silent zero-charge trap → slice-1 toLedgerUnits mapper. Next: slice 1 (llm-client.js) + slice 3 (rossChat SSE). ——— Prior: PR #127 — Phase 7 ④a maxWorkflows cap MERGED + DEPLOYED (first entitlement-limit enforcement, §8). rossActivateWorkflow/rossCreateWorkflow gate active workflow count (status !== 'paused') vs materialized subscriptions/{uid}/limits/maxWorkflows → 403 WORKFLOW_LIMIT_REACHED + v2 'Upgrade plan' link; superAdmin bypass; absent/-1 ⇒ unlimited. Shipped live: CFs + hosting deployed; subscriptionTiers/free/limits/maxWorkflows = 5 set via RTDB REST PATCH (firebase MCP tool errored + firebase-CLI stdin n/a on Windows — a gcloud-token PATCH acts as admin and merges); recompute 43/43; verified free users got maxWorkflows:5 (all-in-mapped tiers unlimited by absence). Review 0 must-fix, 3 🟡 folded (upgradeUrl origin guard, TOCTOU comment, ROSS.md). With #125 (rule lock) + #127 (cap) both deployed, ④a Entitlements is COMPLETE. Next major = ② askRoss Agent build. ——— Prior: PR #125 — Phase 7 ④a RULE LOCK merged: closes the live High self-grant vuln in code. subscriptions/$uid .write → admin-only + child .validate:false on features/limits (resolver = sole writer). 6 admin tier writers routed through entitlementSetTier (relaxed superAdmin→admin, dual claim+RTDB verified); signup Path-B fallback dropped; user-subscription.js + subscription-tier-fix.js made read-only; locationIds writers confirmed dead. Corrected the merged plan's buggy parent-hasChild rule shape → child .validate:false. security-reviewer APPROVED the vuln closure (caught + folded a missed legacy admin_tools/*.html writer); 2 🟡 + 3 🔵 findings folded. 49 tests + build green. ✅ DEPLOYED TO PROD 2026-06-02: gated deploy ran in order — 5 entitlement CFs (first-time) → hosting → rules lock (verified live via readback) → backfill (recomputeEntitlements swept 42/42 subscriptions). The self-grant vuln is now CLOSED in prod. (Emulator gate skipped — no Java in deploy env; relied on security-review reasoning + live readback, operator-approved. One real golden-path signup smoke left to operator.) ④a tail remaining: ROSS maxWorkflows cap (PR5) + the post-lock backfill. Next major = ② askRoss Agent build. Also: PR #124 recovered an orphaned never-merged OWASP audit report; pruned 100 merged remote branches → 2. ——— Prior: PR #120 — Phase 7 ④a writer consolidation (PR3, additive half) merged: server writers route features/limits through the resolver, the 3 dead client writers stripped, the client fake-charge free-upgrade replaced with a /upgrade.html redirect. #120 CFs DEPLOYED to prod 2026-06-01 (registerUser/createUserAccount/checkSubscriptionStatuses + hosting). Rule-lock plan merged (#122, Q1–Q3 settled + review fold-ins); #121 reflect merged. ——— Prior: PR #118 — resolved the open #117 review findings (caught by re-reading the #113–#117 automated-review comments at session start): catalogued the 5 entitlement CFs in both CLOUD_FUNCTIONS_CATALOG copies (🔴 was merged unactioned), switched entitlementGetEffective to authError() for the 403 path (🟡), documented the any-admin-read policy; also folded two #114 doc NITs. ——— Prior: Phase 7 ④a entitlements: resolver core + 5 CFs MERGED (#116) — the additive half (no behavior change yet). ——— ① Credit Ledger DEPLOYED to prod (2026-06-01): billing CFs + rules live, price table seeded; the deploy flushed the previously-undeployed OWASP hardening (#89–#102) live (secrets provisioned). Logged a Medium bug: cleanupOldQueuesScheduled phantom export (#115). ——— Prior: Phase 7 ① Credit Ledger BUILT + MERGED (#113). ——— Phase 7 (askRoss) DESIGN PHASE COMPLETE: all 3 near-term specs MERGED — ① ledger (#106/#108), ④a entitlements (#107), ② askRoss Agent (#110). Agent §3.1 measurement-gates submitResponse (no fabricated compliance records). ——— Prior: Synced to PROJECT_BACKLOG.md: recentlyCompleted now includes the OWASP remediation (14 PRs #89–#102), bug triage queue mirrors the backlog's operational items, and the Security panel summarises the audit. ——— Prior: cleanup-mode evening (PR #86 + #87).

sprint.goal: Effective implementation of Hi-Fi v2, with ROSS as the central post-login surface for every subscribed user
sprint.summary: Concierge-first IA. v1 admin tabs reframed as 'Ross's playbook' — the rules and procedures the future AI agent runs against. Phase 5 closed 2026-05-11. Phase 6 FULLY COMPLETE 2026-05-20 (main scope + stretch): all 5 main PRs shipped — PR 1A tier-gating mechanism (#51), PR 1B curated 5/8 starter library (#53), PR 1C locked-card upsell UX (#55), PR 2 day-zero auto-activation (#58), PR 3 Run execution UI (#65), PR 4 concierge home active-run surfacing (#72) — plus Compliance Sweep stretch template (#83) AND the Missed/Overdue counter consistency follow-up (#86). Workflows are the product; v1 modules become workflow step types over time. Two tiers only: Free (full UI + 5 starter templates), All-in (full library). NOW ACTIVE — Phase 7 (askRoss LLM): decomposed into a 4-component program (① Credit Ledger, ④a Entitlement resolver + add-ons, ② askRoss Agent, plus deferred ③ Payment Rail + ④b tier migration). Design phase COMPLETE — 3 specs merged (#106/#107/#108/#110). Entering build in order ① → ④a → ②.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — gap analysis & spec
phases.summary: PR #18. Audit found home feed already wired behind ROSS_HOME_REAL_DATA flag.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — wire right-rail + first-run findings
ROSS v2 — action handlers + snooze
phases.summary: PR #20. dispatch(action, card) + rossV2Snooze CF deployed + read-side filter.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — admin redesign (concierge-first IA)
phases.summary: All Phase 4 tasks merged: 4a Playbook (PRs #21/#24), 4b Activity (#23), 4c People CRUD (#25), 4d.1 Workflow editor (#28), 4d.2 Template CRUD superAdmin (#30), 4e.1 Per-task input-type editor (#32), 4e.2 Subtask→task propagation + template-level inputType editor (#35). All v2 admin tabs are flag-ON behind /ross.html and edit-capable end-to-end.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — central-funnel cleanup
phases.summary: Closed 2026-05-11. Five PRs all merged: post-login router (#39), signup v2 Hi-Fi + dynamic tier writes (#42), homepage v2 Hi-Fi + reused public hello (#44), router rollout + drop wizard for fresh signups (#46, PR 4 + PR 6 folded), ROSS sidebar cleanup (#48). ROSS is now the post-login destination end-to-end.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — playbook UX enrichment + template library curation
phases.summary: Main scope complete 2026-05-19. PR 1A (#51) tier-gating mechanism. PR 1B (#53) curated 5 Free / 8 All-in split. PR 1C (#55) locked-card upsell UX + /upgrade.html. PR 2 (#58) day-zero auto-activation (mid-PR architecture pivot to dedicated rossSeedFirstWorkflow CF after preview revealed registerUser callable throwing unauthenticated). PR 3 (#65) operator-facing Run execution UI for all 10 inputTypes. PR 4 (#72) concierge home active-run surfacing — new rossGetHomeWorkflowDigest CF + 5 card variants + LEARNING_MODE fallback + 'Missed' chip framing at daysLate >= 4 + home feed auto-reload on mount. Two preview-driven defects in PR #72 (nextDueDate number-not-string; runs have no status field) — same root-cause family as the validated 2026-05-01 SELF_OPT, second occurrence in 18 days. Stretch task (Compliance Sweep starter template) remains optional. Vocabulary per public/kb/features/ROSS.md: Templates → Workflows → Tasks → Runs.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — askRoss LLM (4-component program)
phases.summary: Decomposed 2026-05-31 from a single CF into a 4-component program (billing is shared platform infra, not an askRoss feature). North star: Ross runs the paperwork, not the restaurant. DESIGN PHASE COMPLETE — 3 specs merged: ① Credit Ledger (prepaid-ZAR metering modelled on Anthropic's prepaid wallet, #106/#108); ④a Entitlement resolver + add-on layer (closes a live entitlement self-grant vuln, #107); ② askRoss Agent (tool-use agent, bands A+B = read + workflow/run ops, graduated-risk policy engine auto/confirm/off + kill switch + audit, Sonnet 4.6/streaming SSE/prompt caching, ledger+entitlement pre-flight gates, 20-prompt eval harness; §3.1 measurement-gates submitResponse so the agent never fabricates a compliance record, #110). Build NEXT in dependency order ① → ④a → ②. ① ledger + ④a entitlements LIVE; ② Agent build STARTED — spec revised (#129: §1.1 engine-agnostic core + §2.1 per-engine billing) and the engine-agnostic core slice 2 shipped (#130: functions/agent/). Deferred: ③ Payment Rail (gateway/top-ups), ④b tier 4→2 migration, web-sourced day-zero findings.

Phase 7 build — ② askRoss Agent. Spec REVISED (#129). Slice 2 SHIPPED (#130): functions/agent/ engine-agnostic core (Zod registry → 2 projections, effectivePolicy + autoAllowlist, mode-aware cached prompt, audit-wrapped executeTool, §3.1 gate; 4 ready + 12 pending tools). Slice 1 SHIPPED (#132): llm-client.js (streamTurn/createTurn/toLedgerUnits/MODELS, lazy client seam; @anthropic-ai/sdk). 48 tests. Remaining: slice 3 (rossChat SSE CF — pre-flight gates → loop → ledger debit → SSE), slice 4 (confirm-flow), slice 5 (Ask Ross client), slice 6 (evals), slice 7 (ross/agent* rules).

recentlyCompleted.title: Phase 7 ② askRoss tool-schema dialect fix — Ask Ross was 400ing every turn. toAnthropicTools emitted draft-4 boolean exclusiveMinimum; Anthropic requires JSON Schema draft 2020-12. Dropped {target:openApi3} for the default jsonSchema7 (numeric exclusiveMinimum); the jsonSchema2020-12 target is itself buggy. Found via prod logs (139 server tests all mocked the LLM client). +2 regression guards, 175/175 green, redeployed + verified live.

Phase 7 ② askRoss slice 5 — Ask Ross ⌘K client: streams the rossChat SSE CF into a multi-turn command-palette modal with inline confirm-cards + terminal/error banners. 3 pure/thin modules (frame parser, immutable reducer, fetch()+ReadableStream transport with a FLAT body — EventSource cant POST/auth) + 3 components (no v-html). Retires the scripted askRoss() stub. 20 unit tests; build + 173/173 functions green. Subagent-driven, per-task + final review (2 folded, 1 declined). Desktop only (mobile→3a).

Phase 7 ② askRoss slice 7 — ross/agent* RTDB rules (agentChats/agentAudit/agentConfig/agentPending: server-only writes, CF-mediated reads) + rossAgentPrune scheduled CF (daily 03:30, prunes expired agentPending + stale debitGuard). The launch-blocker that had to land before the client slice.

Phase 7 ② askRoss slice 4 — confirm-flow pause/resume + 4 confirm-tier tools. The agent now authors the playbook with the owner in the loop: a confirm-tier tool (activate/create/edit/pause workflow) PAUSES → persists a pending action at ross/agentPending/{uid}/{turnId} (10-min expiry, server-keyed, uid-scoped) + debits Request A (abandoned confirms still bill, §2.1) + emits a confirm card → the owner's resume ({resumeTurnId, decision}) re-runs the pre-flight gates (kill-switch holds), checks expiry (fail-closed), atomically one-time-consumes the pending (no double-fire), executes (audited confirmed:<uid>) or declines, then continues the loop (Request B, distinct requestId). HALF B: extracted rossActivateWorkflow/rossCreateWorkflow/rossUpdateWorkflow write-logic into owner-callable *AsOwner cores in ross.js shared by BOTH the CF handler and the agent adapters (byte-for-byte handler parity; coded errors → HTTP status or tool_result); promoted the 4 confirm tools pending→READY. Those 3 handlers had ZERO prior tests → ross-workflow-ops.test.js is the regression net. 8 commits / 7 TDD phases; two review rounds — local security-reviewer (H-1 gate-on-resume, M-1 fail-closed expiry, M-2 payload guard) + automated (M-1 pending-flag symmetry, M-2 email-in-audit, M-3 confirm-summary fallbacks), all folded. 166/166 functions tests + build green. ⚠ rossChat is LIVE — redeploy needed (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY provisioned; cd functions && npm install first). NEXT = slice 7 ross/agent* RTDB rules + prune (launch-blocker before slice 5 per the security review).

Phase 7 ② askRoss slice 3 — rossChat reactive SSE Cloud Function (the project's first AI-inference CF). functions/agent/rossChat.js: the v1 reactive engine over the raw Anthropic Messages API. Four pre-flight gates (kill switch → per-owner enable → features.rossAgent → ledger balance; super-admins skip entitlement+balance, not the kill switch) → cached two-breakpoint prompt + bounded history → runAgentLoop (streams text; auto tools via the audit-wrapped executeTool; non-auto refused server-side — confirm-flow is slice 4) → single idempotent ledger debit (recordUsageAndDebit gained an optional requestId guard) → persist turn + SSE. New verifyRossAgentAccess (recognises rossAgent; verifyUserOrAdmin untouched) + ross.js __setDbForTests seam. Built in 6 TDD phases; two review rounds (local security+code, then automated — no blockers) folded: server-generated requestId (closed a free-turn vector), threadId/clientToday validation, best-effort loop debits partial spend on LLM error, structured SSE events, warm-client reuse. 139/139 functions tests + build green; catalog updated (both copies). ⚠ Deploy secret-first (functions:secrets:set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY); server-only, no client yet. T-1 (ross/agent* RTDB rules) → slice 7; T-2 (debitGuard retention) → bug queue.

Phase 7 ② askRoss Agent — llm-client (slice 1). functions/agent/llm-client.js: the swappable wrapper over the raw Anthropic Messages API for the v1 reactive engine. streamTurn (pipes text deltas to onText, returns {content,usage,stopReason} — final carries tool_use + complete usage); createTurn (non-streaming, eval judge); toLedgerUnits(apiUsage) snake→camel mapper (closes #129 §2.1 zero-charge trap — ledger reads camelCase units); MODELS (AGENT claude-sonnet-4-6 / JUDGE claude-haiku-4-5-20251001); lazy/injectable client seam (configureClient/getClient/__setClientForTests — SDK lazy-required, zero live calls in tests). 9 tests (incl. verbatim usage-block mapping + anti-pattern proof). API surface verified vs /anthropics/anthropic-sdk-typescript (context7); deliberately NOT using beta.toolRunner (reactive v1 owns its loop). Adds @anthropic-ai/sdk. Review 1 🔴 (Haiku model ID needed date suffix → would 404 at runtime) + 2 nits (?? vs ||, maxTokens 4096) all folded. 48 agent tests + build green.

Phase 7 ② askRoss Agent — engine-agnostic core (slice 2). functions/agent/: constants (tier ranks, MODE/STATUS, NO_UNDO, MEASUREMENT_INPUT_TYPES + isAgentSubmittable §3.1 gate), policy (effectivePolicy tighten-only + clampToCeiling), prompt (systemBlocks 2 cache_control:ephemeral breakpoints, mode-aware identity), tools (ONE Zod registry → toAnthropicTools + toSdkMcpServer lazy/seamed; enabledToolNames/autoAllowlist/catalogForPrompt), execute (executeTool audit-wraps every run + no-undo prev capture). 4 ready adapters + 12 pending (run throws AdapterPendingError). Zero hard engine dep (Agent SDK lazy-required behind a test seam). Adds zod + zod-to-json-schema. 39 agent + 87 functions tests; build green. Review 0 must-fix, 5 folded (KB drift, autoAllowlist plan-vs-code divergence, snapshotPrev/NO_UNDO coupling comment, ctx.now server-time comment, rules-timing) — caught + rejected a reviewer-suggested agentConfig client-write rule as contradicting §9. Deferred: 3 ross.js extraction refactors, 3 reader CFs, advanceDueDate recurrence, slice-7 rules.

Phase 7 ② askRoss Agent — spec revision (engine-agnostic core + per-engine billing). After a design session on the Claude Agent SDK vs the raw Anthropic Messages API: §1.1 'one engine-agnostic core, two engines' (v1 reactive owns the loop on the raw API for the confirm-pause + per-turn billing; v2 proactive rents the loop on the Agent SDK for the unattended sweep) + §2.1 per-engine billing (debit granularity, pre-flight thresholds, PreToolUse balance-abort hook, confirm-pause billed twice, idempotent debits). Ground-truth check of functions/billing/ledger.js confirmed it already prices the 4 cache-token classes (no ledger change) but caught a snake_case API usage → camelCase ledger units silent zero-charge trap (slice-1 toLedgerUnits mapper). Review 0 must-fix, 5 folded.

Phase 7 ④a — maxWorkflows cap, MERGED + DEPLOYED (first entitlement-limit enforcement, §8). rossActivateWorkflow/rossCreateWorkflow gate active workflow count (status !== 'paused') vs materialized subscriptions/{uid}/limits/maxWorkflows → 403 WORKFLOW_LIMIT_REACHED + v2 Upgrade-plan link; superAdmin bypass; absent/-1 ⇒ unlimited. Pure functions/ross-workflow-cap.js (10 unit tests). Shipped live: CFs + hosting deployed; subscriptionTiers/free/limits/maxWorkflows = 5 set via RTDB REST PATCH (firebase MCP errored + CLI stdin n/a on Windows); recompute 43/43; verified free users got maxWorkflows:5. Review 0 must-fix, 3 🟡 folded (upgradeUrl origin guard, TOCTOU comment, ROSS.md drift). Completes ④a Entitlements.

Phase 7 ④a — subscriptions/$uid RULE LOCK (closes the High self-grant vuln, code-complete). .write → admin-only + child .validate:false on features/limits; the resolver (Admin SDK) is the sole writer. 6 admin tier writers routed through entitlementSetTier (relaxed superAdmin→admin via new dual claim+RTDB verifyAdmin); signup Path-B fallback dropped (registerUser is sole provisioning path; errors surface loudly); user-subscription.js + subscription-tier-fix.js owner-writers made read-only; locationIds writers confirmed dead. Corrected the merged plan's buggy parent-hasChild rule shape → child .validate:false (parent hasChild false-rejects multi-path admin writes). security-reviewer APPROVED the vuln closure + caught a missed legacy admin_tools/*.html writer (folded). 2 🟡 (verifyAdmin dual-check; signup error-render verified) + 3 🔵 (Promise.all bulk loops, JSDoc) folded. 49 tests + build green. ⚠ DEPLOY GATED: strict CFs→hosting→emulator→rules→backfill→signup-smoke.

OWASP audit report recovery — recovered docs/security/owasp-audit-2026-05-30.html (1198 lines, the backlog's cited security source-of-truth) which had never been merged and lived only on an orphaned branch. Caught during a repo house-clean that also pruned 100 merged remote branches → 2 and removed 3 stale worktrees. Cherry-pick recovery → docs-only PR.

Phase 7 ④a — writer consolidation (PR3, additive half). Server-side resolver now materializes subscriptions/{uid}/features+limits on the live paths: registerUser/createUserAccount call recomputeEntitlements after the subscription write; subscriptionStatusManager recomputes on expiry (strip-to-Free immediately). All best-effort (account already written; readers fall back to tier constants per audit finding B; daily cron self-heals). 3 dead subscription-service.js client writers stripped of features/limits (⚠ DEAD-marked); user-subscription.js upgradeToPlan fake-charge free-upgrade replaced with a /upgrade.html redirect. NO rule change (the subscriptions/$uid .write LOCK is PR4, deploys only after #120's CFs are live; security-reviewer mandatory). Automated review LGTM; 🟡 folded, 🔵 captured the extra admin-writer audit targets for PR4. CFs deployed to prod 2026-06-01.

#117 review fold-ins — catalogued the 5 entitlement CFs + fixed entitlementGetEffective error-status. Resolved the open #117 review findings (caught at session start by re-reading the #113–#117 automated-review comments — the 🔴 had been merged unactioned). Added the Entitlements (Phase 7 ④a) section to both CLOUD_FUNCTIONS_CATALOG.md copies (the ② Agent build plans against this catalog); switched entitlementGetEffective's badRequest('Forbidden')+regex-remap-to-403 to authError() (statusCode 403, exported from entitlements/auth.js); documented the intentional any-admin-read policy. No behaviour change; 49 entitlements+billing tests pass; build green.

Phase 7 ④a — entitlement resolver core + 5 CFs (additive half). functions/entitlements/: pure mergeEntitlements (feature OR, additive limits, -1 unlimited, expiry/cancel filtering) + recomputeEntitlements (eventual SOLE writer of materialized features/limits; expiry strips to Free; atomic materialization into canonical paths) + 5 CFs (entitlementSetTier/GrantAddOn/CancelAddOn superAdmin; entitlementGetEffective self-scoped; recomputeExpiringEntitlements daily cron). 22 TDD tests; extended in-memory RTDB fake (root multi-path update). No behavior change yet — writer consolidation + rule lock (closes the High self-grant vuln) is the next risky slice.

Phase 7 ① Credit Ledger DEPLOYED to prod + OWASP backlog flush. Deployed billing CFs + billing/* rules + seeded price table (Sonnet/Haiku USD rates, markup 1.30). Same deploy flushed the entire previously-undeployed OWASP hardening (#89-#102) live — MERAKI_SHARED_SECRET/INITIAL_ADMIN_SETUP_SECRET provisioned by operator, 106 functions deployed, live rules verified. Surfaced + logged a Medium bug (cleanupOldQueuesScheduled phantom export, #115). Deploy was operationally bumpy (secrets-block, firebase-tools post-deploy hang, 429 quota retries, MSYS/BOM CLI-write retries on the seed) — all lessoned.

Phase 7 ① Credit Ledger build — shared USD-denominated prepaid credit ledger (functions/billing/): ledger.js (pure cost formula USD cents + service dispatch; atomic debit via pre-gen-key + transaction + retry-safe no-double-debit; grant+audit; checkBalance gate; getUsage newest-first pagination), 3 CFs (billingGrantCredit superAdmin / billingGetBalance+billingGetUsage self-scoped), billing/* server-only rules (same change-set), price-table seed (markup 1.30, no FX). Operator pivoted unit-of-account ZAR->USD post-spec-merge (global-ready) — spec+plan amended before coding. 27 TDD tests (golden vectors + x.5 rounding pin, unknown-model NaN guard, pagination); in-memory RTDB fake. Code-reviewed. DEPLOY PENDING (npm install in worktree, deploy functions:billing* + database together, run seed).

Phase 7 askRoss — design phase COMPLETE (all 3 near-term specs). Decomposed Phase 7 into a 4-component program (ledger → entitlements → agent → payment rail), each its own spec. Shipped 3 design docs: ① prepaid-ZAR Credit Ledger (modelled on Anthropic's prepaid wallet); ④a Entitlement resolver/add-on layer; ② askRoss Agent (reactive-v1/proactive-ready tool-use agent, bands A+B, graduated-risk policy engine + kill switch + audit, Sonnet 4.6/streaming SSE/prompt caching, ledger+entitlement pre-flight gates, 20-prompt eval harness). The ④a design audit caught a live entitlement self-grant vuln (logged High; fix scoped into the ④a build); the ② review caught a compliance-fabrication risk → spec §3.1 measurement-gates submitResponse. Next: /plan → build in order ① → ④a → ②.

OWASP remediation — all Highs + most Mediums/Lows (10 PRs #93–#102). H-4/H-7/H-10 logging+CSPRNG, H-5/H-6 CORS (new shared functions/cors-allowlist.js), H-3/H-4b, H-2 Bucket A/B (6 RTDB root reads locked to admin + userLocations child rules + design doc), H-9 npm audit (lockfile-only, all crit+high cleared), M-1 location ownerId, M-2 security headers, M-4 stored XSS in googleReviews.js, M-6/M-10/L-1/L-2 logging+createTestData gate, M-8 POPIA deletion. Every PR auto-reviewed; 2 must-fixes caught + fixed pre-merge (#96 ownerId fallback, #102 phoneNumber indexes). Consumer-mapping via 3 parallel agents drove the H-2 bucket split.

OWASP Top-10 audit remediation — 5/5 Criticals + first Highs (#89/#90/#91). C-1 operator-precedence admin-bypass across 12 CFs (every admin guard was a no-op), C-2 hardcoded secrets → Secrets Manager + gate, C-3 getGoogleConfig admin-gate (+ shared requireAdmin), C-4 public-writable RTDB nodes, C-5 OCR SSRF allowlist, H-1 queue mutators, H-8 Storage write. #91 caught a real auth≠authz must-fix (token-only insufficient for a billable-key endpoint).

ROSS Cloud Functions catalog + allowed-fields per mutator — closed backlog item #12. `public/kb/features/ROSS.md#cloud-functions` is now canonical with all 22 functions documented (was 18 — added rossSeedFirstWorkflow, rossManageStaff, rossV2Snooze, rossGetHomeWorkflowDigest). New 'Allowed-fields per mutator' subsection with file:line refs for the 4 server allowedFields constants — would have caught the PR #28 t.id bug at planning time. CLOUD_FUNCTIONS_CATALOG.md gets 8-category summary + Source File Map entries for the 3 missing ross-*.js files. Field-verify rule footnote cites the three negative-confirmation PRs (#28 / #72 / #86). Automated review caught a forward-reference between in-flight PRs (cited workflow-status.js from PR #86 while #86 still open) — fixed via 'ships with PR #86' qualifier then past tense after rebase.

Missed/Overdue counter consistency (PR #72 follow-up) — fix operator-reported inconsistency where home card warned about Missed workflows but Playbook + Activity tabs both said 'Overdue: 0'. Root cause: server's locData.status is 'active' forever and never updated to 'overdue' — w.status === 'overdue' filter always returned 0. New public/js/modules/ross/v2/workflow-status.js shared helper (MISSED_DAYS_THRESHOLD + computeDaysLate + isOverdue + isMissed) consumed by both stores AND detectors.js — single source of truth across three surfaces. RossPlaybook + RossActivity stat tiles use dynamic Missed/Overdue label mirroring the home card. 25 new vitest cases including a real-server-shape contract test that reproduces the operator's exact bug.

Phase 6 stretch — Weekly Compliance Sweep starter template — first end-to-end curated ROSS template exercising Phase 4e.2 per-subtask inputType + inputConfig: 5 subtasks × 4 input types (2× temperature with auto-flag + requiredNote on out-of-range, yes_no, checkbox, text/maxLength 500); tier:free, weekly recurrence, daysBeforeAlert [2,1]; two files (updated seed for fresh deploys + idempotent ross-templates-add-compliance-sweep.js for live prod RTDB matching the PR #51/#58 one-off-script pattern); no CF or client changes — existing rossActivateWorkflow + rossCreateRun paths already honour the contract

bugs.title: v-html="c.detail" on the Ross home story card — latent stored-XSS surface
bugs.notes: public/js/modules/ross/v2/components/RossHomeDesktop.vue:203 renders the card detail via v-html (presumably for <strong> emphasis). Today detail is sourced only from static copy (v2/content.js) and detector template strings built from server-derived numbers/labels (v2/detectors.js — requiredTaskCount, nextDueLabel, aggSuffix), so it is NOT currently exploitable. But it violates the 'zero v-html on agent/server content' discipline (LESSON 2026-06-04 vue/escaping, #139); the moment detail carries richer/free-text/agent-authored data it becomes a stored-XSS vector. Fix: render via {{ }}, sanitize, or move emphasis to structured fields. The vue/no-v-html eslint rule (guard-backfill seed item #2, docs/analysis/2026-06-05-lesson-guard-coverage.md) flags this automatically once enabled. Confirmed live by the #143 automated review.

bugs.title: cleanupOldQueuesScheduled cron has never deployed — export clobbered by module.exports reassignment
bugs.notes: queueAnalytics.js:343 does exports.cleanupOldQueuesScheduled = onSchedule('every 24 hours', ...), but line 357's module.exports = {...} replaces the whole exports object (CommonJS), dropping that assignment. So require('./queueAnalytics').cleanupOldQueuesScheduled is undefined, index.js:2243 exports undefined, and firebase reports 'No function matches the filter' — never a deployable function. Consequence: automated daily queue pruning is NOT running (only the manual cleanupOldQueues HTTP fn works), compounding the unbounded-node retention bug. Found during the ledger deploy (106 deployed vs 107 exports). Fix: include cleanupOldQueuesScheduled in the module.exports object (or move the assignment after it). One-line merge + redeploy.

bugs.title: salesData .write root still auth != null (any authed user can create new salesData records)
bugs.notes: The H-2 work (PR #96) tightened salesData reads to admin + per-child owner, but the root .write remains auth != null. The per-child .validate guards overwriting an existing record, but any authenticated user can still CREATE new salesData records under arbitrary keys (no userId-match enforced on create). Low-impact (data pollution, not exfiltration) but inconsistent with the read lockdown. Fix: create-path .validate/.write requiring newData.child('userId').val() === auth.uid || admin. Surfaced as a NIT on already-merged code.

bugs.title: rewardsProcessor.js:646 modulo bias in generateFallbackCode
bugs.notes: crypto.randomBytes(6) then byte % 36 over-represents chars 0-3 by ~14% (256 % 36 = 4). Far better than the old Math.random() but not uniform for a security-relevant voucher fallback code. Fix: rejection sampling (while code.length<6: b=randomBytes(1)[0]; if b<252 code += chars[b%36]). ~0.09 extra bytes/code. Surfaced as a 🟡 on already-merged OWASP-era code.

bugs.title: Entitlement self-grant — clients can write their own subscriptions/{uid}/features+limits [✅ CLOSED + DEPLOYED 2026-06-02 (#125): subscriptions/$uid .write admin-only + child .validate:false on features/limits, verified live via rules readback; gated deploy ran CFs→hosting→rules→backfill (recompute swept 42/42). No longer live.]
bugs.notes: database.rules.json:28 allows $uid/.write for auth.uid === $uid, with a .validate that only checks tier exists in subscriptionTiers. Any authed owner can write features/<anyPremiumFlag>: true or limits/maxWorkflows: 99999 from the browser console — broken access control / privilege escalation. Actively exercised by client subscription-service.js (createSubscription/updateSubscription/startFreeTrial write features/limits from a hardcoded RTDB-unsynced constant). OWASP follow-on the 2026-05-30 audit missed. Fix is structural and scoped into Phase 7 sub-project 4a (docs/plans/2026-05-31-entitlements-addon-layer-design.md): a server-side entitlement resolver becomes the sole writer of materialized features/limits, the 7 divergent writers route through CFs, then subscriptions/$uid .write locks to admin/server-only. No (fixed by Phase 7 4a build).

bugs.title: Recurrence-engine gap: nextDueDate never advances when daily workflow goes uncompleted
bugs.notes: Operator noted on PR #72 preview: 'I see one workflow that hasn't been completed daily since it was created.' rossSubmitResponse auto-completes the run when all required tasks are done but does NOT advance the workflow's nextDueDate for the next cycle. A daily workflow created 10 days ago with no run completed reads as daysLate: 10 instead of rolling forward. Fix needs: (a) on run completion, advance nextDueDate by recurrence period; (b) decide policy when a cycle is fully missed (advance on next 'create run' attempt OR scheduled CF walks every workflow nightly). Touches rossSubmitResponse + possibly rossScheduledReminder. Backlog candidate for a dedicated sprint — recurrence semantics need product input.

bugs.title: Double-seed race on signup retry — rossSeedFirstWorkflow idempotency pre-check is not transactional
bugs.notes: A user double-clicking signup or hitting a network retry could pass the firstWorkflowSeededAt pre-check in both invocations and produce two seeded workflows. Mitigation options: (a) RTDB transaction() on the marker, OR (b) deterministic workflow ID per uid (e.g. seed_{uid}) so duplicate write is overwrite. Exposure small; consequence mild (duplicate workflow, no corruption).

bugs.title: Unbounded-node retention policy — in-app 'Clear X' buttons are time-bombs without scheduled pruning
bugs.notes: Covers /scanningData, /wifiLogins, /activeUsers, /userPreferences, /rateLimitsWifi. Options: scheduled prune CF (chunked-delete pattern), TTL-on-write, or rollups. Needs product call on retention window per node.

bugs.title: updateWifiDisconnect CF for disconnect-status tracking
bugs.notes: logUserDisconnection is now a no-op stub since the direct /activeUsers write is admin-only. Disconnect signal is best-effort browser-unload anyway; analytics filtering by status==='disconnected' see records stuck at active:true. Proper fix: small CF taking sessionID + anonUid.

bugs.title: Walled-garden audit at every deployed Meraki venue
bugs.notes: submitWifiLogin CF lives at *.cloudfunctions.net. If a venue's captive-portal walled garden doesn't include that host, the CF call fails silently → offline-queue fallback → guest gets WiFi but no data captured. Audit each venue's whitelist.

bugs.title: Phone normalization to E.164 in submitWifiLogin
bugs.notes: Stores raw phoneNumber as received from intlTelInput getNumber(). libphonenumber server-side would normalize on write. Deferred to avoid the dep + audit-trail effort.

bugs.title: Open-redirect refusal log monitoring
bugs.notes: Host-pattern whitelist on base_grant_url emits console.error on refusal but stays client-side. If a new legitimate Meraki host family appears we won't know until a guest reports a block. Fix: forward to Cloud Logging via a tiny CF.

bugs.title: /scanningData .write: auth != null audit
bugs.notes: Permissive rule — any authed user can write. The Meraki scanner POST flow writes here continuously; tightening without breaking it needs a parallel audit + CF pattern like submitWifiLogin.

bugs.title: PR 2 — Hi-Fi v2 wifi-login rewrite (deferred findings)
bugs.notes: Closes deferred audit findings: dual activeUsers schemas, ipinfo.io no consent disclosure, weak email/name regex, localStorage PII unencrypted, footer cosmetic — plus offline-queue retry-path gap (post-Meraki-redirect users won't return to the captive page in-session). Flag-gated via customization/useV2WifiLogin.

bugs.title: Workflow task edit not reflected in restarted run
bugs.notes: Operator changed a task's inputType (temperature → photo), saved, started a new run — run UI still showed the old inputType. Could be editor not persisting inputType, rossManageTask not landing, stale read, or viewing an old completed run's snapshot. Needs repro before fix.

bugs.title: Task editor UX needs single-Save + success feedback + auto-exit
bugs.notes: RossPlaybookWorkflowTasksEditor currently has a Save per row and saving doesn't exit or confirm. Desired: one bottom Save committing all dirty tasks + success message + auto-exit.

bugs.title: Subscription resolves 'enterprise' tier for the operator's test account
bugs.notes: feature-access-control log shows Resolved tier ID: enterprise (from tierId). Tier system is free/all-in only. Operator account has legacy tierId:'enterprise'. Decide: backfill to all-in or formalize enterprise as a third tier.

bugs.title: Server auto-completes runs after a single response when required-task count is small
bugs.notes: Auto-completion treats all tasks with required!==false as required. Seeded Daily Opening Checklist has 4 subtasks with no explicit required field → all 4 required. Operator hit 'Run is already completed' 409 implying something auto-completed prematurely. Needs focused repro.

high: Recurrence-engine gap — nextDueDate doesn't advance when daily workflow goes uncompleted (PR #72 preview catch; needs product input on missed-cycle policy)
Food cost open PR — review and merge
Chart.js retirement (soak ended ~2026-05-07; execute removal per CHARTJS_REMOVAL_AUDIT.md — 16 of 23 sites have v2 replacements)
medium: Fold readUserTier into verifyUserOrAdmin to eliminate the extra RTDB read on tier-gated handlers (PR #51 review finding #3 — touches 10+ handlers, perf-refactor PR)

Backfill script polish: pre-flight check warning if rules deployed before backfill + pull databaseURL from process.env with fallback (PR #51 review findings #7/#8; sister to PR #58's hardcoded URL in ross-config-set-first-workflow.js)
rossCreateWorkflow refactor to use buildWorkflowRecord helper (PR #58 reviewer Should-Fix #3 — out-of-scope for that PR; finishes the rossActivateWorkflow extraction work)
Investigate mobile nav missing Playbook/Activity/People on ROSS home (operator-flagged PR #58)
Hi-Fi v2 → v1 promotions (guests, queue, analytics, campaigns, receipts) — partially superseded by Phase 5 PR 5 sidebar cleanup
HfModal / HfConfirm design-system components — v2 needs a Hi-Fi-native modal pattern; SweetAlert2 is v1-only
Build /profile-settings.html for ROSS user account (sidebar footer gear icon non-interactive until shipped — PR #48 follow-up)
low: Double-seed race on signup retry — rossSeedFirstWorkflow idempotency pre-check is not transactional (PR #58 final-review note; mitigation: RTDB transaction or deterministic workflow ID per uid)
Group overview v2 → v1 promotion (likely dropped — see Phase 5 PR 5)
Onboarding flow improvements (lower-priority items in spec — surface store.error, lower FINDING_MIN_LIFT, parallelise detectBestWeekday reads, un-hardcode 3-of-5 step counter)
Edit-mode multi-location pill render in workflow editor

security.summary: Operator-supplied audit remediated across 14 PRs (#89–#102). All Criticals and Highs closed; most Mediums/Lows done. Remaining items are scoped follow-ups.
remaining: H-2 Bucket C — guests/queue/receipts root-read refactor (needs architecture decision)
M-3 — Subresource Integrity (SRI) on CDN scripts across all HTML pages
M-5 / M-7 / L-3 — Bucket-C-class root reads (consumer mapping first)
firebase-admin@13 upgrade (clears last 8 moderate npm advisories)
deployPrereqs: Rotate the leaked Meraki + admin secrets and update the Meraki dashboard
GCP console: add an HTTP-referrer restriction to the Google Places API key
Run emulator/preview smoke on the rules changes (#96 / #100 / #102)
